title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Borough Park, Brooklyn
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Borough Park, Brooklyn. Safe, humane bat extraction from homes and buildings. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Borough Park residents facing bat infestations need fast, humane solutions that protect both families and property. Our certified bat removal specialists provide comprehensive exclusion services tailored to the unique architecture of Borough Park's brownstones, multi-family homes, and residential buildings. We ensure bats are safely removed and prevented from returning, all while complying with NYC wildlife protection regulations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Borough Park's diverse community with respectful, efficient service that works around your schedule. Our technicians are fully licensed, insured, and trained in the latest humane bat exclusion techniques, ensuring your home is bat-free with guaranteed results.
localContext: Borough Park's mix of pre-war apartment buildings, attached row houses, and older residential structures along 13th Avenue and surrounding streets often feature attics, eaves, and ventilation systems that attract roosting bats. The tree-lined streets near parks and the proximity to Prospect Park create ideal conditions for bat activity, making professional exclusion services essential for homeowners and property managers in the area.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my Borough Park home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds in attics or walls at dusk or dawn, droppings (guano) that resemble mouse droppings but crumble easily, dark stains near entry points, and seeing bats exit your home at sunset. If you notice any of these signs in your Borough Park residence, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in Borough Park safe and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes. We follow all NYC and federal guidelines for humane bat exclusion. Our process involves identifying entry points, installing one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but not return, sealing all access points, and cleaning affected areas. We never harm bats, as they're protected species that play vital roles in our ecosystem.

faqs.question: What does the $900 – $2,500 price range include?
faqs.answer: Our pricing depends on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and size of your property. The cost includes thorough inspection, humane bat exclusion, sealing of all entry points, attic sanitation and guano removal, repairs to damaged areas, and a warranty against re-entry. We provide free estimates for all Borough Park properties.

faqs.question: How long does bat exclusion take in Borough Park homes?
faqs.answer: The exclusion process typically takes 3-7 days, though timing depends on the size of the colony and building complexity. Initial inspection and device installation happen on day one, followed by a monitoring period to ensure all bats have exited. Final sealing and cleanup occur once we confirm the colony has vacated. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your household.
